scripts.dev:full: npm run db:migrate && concurrently -n api,web -c green,blue "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.lint: npm -w backend run lint && npm -w frontend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w backend run typecheck && npm -w frontend run typecheck
scripts.build: npm run lint && npm -w backend run build && npm -w frontend run build
scripts.test: npm -w backend run test && npm -w frontend run test
scripts.test:coverage: npm -w backend run test:coverage && npm -w frontend run test:coverage
